name: My Last Stand: Survivors
short_description: Zombies are approaching fast. You have nothing to trust but the weapon in your hand. Eliminate zombies as quickly as possible. Survive. Gain upgrade points to unlock different abilities. And become stronger. Hold your position until the end of time. Then you can escape from this bloody hell.
detailed_description:
The virus continues to ravage. Zombies wander around. And there is no sign of any rescue.

You have lost all hope. The only way to survive is to carve out a path of blood.

Throw away all those tedious character designs, backgrounds, and operations. Participate in this refreshing, direct, and exhilarating battle! Experience the ultimate tension and excitement. And enjoy the pleasure brought by the game.

This is not an ordinary survivor game. You need to keep moving, save energy, and shoot cautiously. Eliminate as many enemies as possible to collect upgrade points and level up. Prepare for the tides of zombies.

As an individual independent developer, I only create games that I enjoy playing and hope to share them with you. If you are interested in this game, please add it to your wish list.
Please write me an email to hr_zhai@163.com so that I can hear your thoughts on the game. Thank you!
